notes: Starts data-level alignment for the separated edible + caution/preparation/other-use model.
Normalizes selected warning/comparison and emergency-only records away from normal edible routing without suppressing useful records.
Keeps selected legitimate edible records food-valid while moving caution, young-only, prep, poor-quality, and comparison context into additive warning/card notes.
Clarifies selected plant records where ordinary edible use, medicinal/traditional tea, root/bark warnings, and emergency/other-use context were mixed together.
